extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays relatively low (around or below 0.3) for a long middle portion, without a strong late upward spike.  
R2: Any later increase in the last third of the series is modest (peak remains clearly below the early maximum and below about 0.6).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop and mid‑segment valley, the series shows a clear, sustained rise to a mid‑segment plateau around 0.45–0.55.  
R2: Near the end of the series there is a pronounced upward spike or hump (values rising well above the preceding mid‑segment level, approaching or exceeding about 0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (first ~15 time steps), the series reaches its minimum level relatively early (before the midpoint of the time axis).  
R2: In the second half of the series there is no strong late spike: values stay roughly within a mid‑range band without a pronounced surge near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series continues to decline and reaches its minimum level later, around or after the midpoint of the time axis.  
R2: In the last quarter of the series there is a noticeable upward surge or spike, where values rise significantly above the preceding mid‑range plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (first 15–20 time steps), the series stays in a low trough region (around 0.1–0.2) without any strong upward spike for at least the next 15–20 time steps.  
R2: In the last third of the series, the values rise only moderately and remain below about 0.6 (no large terminal spike).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series also enters a low trough, but then rises into a plateau in the middle of the series where it stays roughly between 0.4 and 0.55 for an extended segment.  
R2: Near the end of the series, there is a pronounced upward spike where the values exceed about 0.6 before dropping or ending.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time 0–20), the series stays low (near its minimum) for an extended middle segment before rising again (a clear “valley, then late rise” shape).
R2: Toward the end (last third of the series), the values increase and then remain in a relatively stable, medium band without any sharp spike higher than the initial peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time 0–20), the series quickly recovers to a medium level and forms a broad plateau in the middle segment instead of staying near its minimum for long.
R2: Near the end (last third of the series), the series either stays around that medium level with noticeable oscillations or shows a distinct late spike that reaches a level comparable to or higher than the initial peak.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (roughly first 10–15 time steps), the series stays at a relatively low level (around 0.1–0.3) for a long middle segment before rising again.
R2: In the final third of the series, the values rise to a moderate level (around 0.4–0.55) and then fluctuate gently without any very sharp spike.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series also stays low in the middle, but the subsequent rise reaches a clearer plateau or gentle hump at a moderate level (around 0.45–0.55) for much of the mid–late segment.
R2: Near the very end of the series, there is either a distinct upward spike (up to about 0.7 or higher) or a noticeable brief surge compared to the preceding moderate plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays in a relatively low band (roughly between 0.1 and 0.35) for a longer middle portion before rising again.
R2: The final rise is moderate and smooth, ending around the middle range (roughly 0.4–0.55) without any sharp spike at the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series quickly climbs to (and stays for a while in) a higher middle band (roughly 0.4–0.55) without spending much time in a very low range.
R2: Near the end of the series, there is a distinct sharp upward spike to a high value (around 0.7–0.85) before it drops slightly again.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time index 10–20), the series stays relatively low for a while, with its minimum value occurring roughly before the midpoint of the time axis.
R2: In the second half of the series, the values rise again and then fluctuate in a moderate band (roughly between 0.3 and 0.6) without any sharp spike at the very end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak and drop, the series continues decreasing so that its minimum value is reached later, around or just after the midpoint of the time axis.
R2: Toward the end of the series, there is either a pronounced upward spike or a clear upward trend, so that the final segment rises noticeably above the middle plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (around time 10–20), the series stays in a low valley near its global minimum until roughly time 35–40, without any strong rise.  
R2: After this valley, the series rises moderately and then fluctuates in a middle band (about 0.35–0.55) without any large spike near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series quickly leaves the low valley and climbs to a sustained mid-level plateau (around 0.4–0.55) by roughly time 30–40.  
R2: Near the end of the series (last ~10–15% of time), there is either a noticeable upward surge or the values stay higher than in the preceding valley, often forming a late spike.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (around time 10–15), the series stays near its minimum for a relatively long, flat “valley” segment (low values maintained roughly from time 20 to 40).
R2: In the last third of the series, values rise but stay in a moderate band, without any late sharp spike that exceeds about 0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series quickly recovers from its minimum and does not remain flat at low values for long (the “valley” is short, ending before about time 30).
R2: In the last third of the series, there is a clear high bump or spike where the values rise steeply above about 0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series remains in a low plateau (values roughly below 0.25) for a relatively long middle portion before rising again.  
R2: The final rise is moderate and does not reach extreme high values (it stays below about 0.6–0.65 and shows no very sharp spike at the end).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the middle plateau is higher than in Class 0 (values typically above about 0.25 for most of the middle segment).  
R2: Near the end, there is a pronounced upward surge or spike to a distinctly higher level than the preceding plateau (approaching or exceeding about 0.65).
